'''zasupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:olation|olation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-s-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:olation|olation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zasupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæsipith|zæsipith]] || [[word:zæsipij|zæsipij]] || [[word:zæsipish|zæsipish]] || [[word:zæsipi|zæsipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zasusuputh|zasusuputh]] || [[word:zasusupuj|zasusupuj]] || [[word:zasusupush|zasusupush]] || [[word:zasusupu|zasusupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zasuputh|zasuputh]] || [[word:zasupuj|zasupuj]] || [[word:zasupush|zasupush]] || [[word:zasupu|zasupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zasufputh|zasufputh]] || [[word:zasufpuj|zasufpuj]] || [[word:zasufpush|zasufpush]] || [[word:zasufpuf|zasufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zasuputhu|zasuputhu]] || [[word:zasupuju|zasupuju]] || [[word:zasupushu|zasupushu]] || [[word:zasupuku|zasupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zasuputh|zasuputh]] || [[word:zasupuj|zasupuj]] || [[word:zasupush|zasupush]] || [[word:zasupu|zasupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zasuputhul|zasuputhul]] || [[word:zasupujul|zasupujul]] || [[word:zasupushul|zasupushul]] || [[word:zasupukul|zasupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zasuputhuthu|zasuputhuthu]] || [[word:zasupujuju|zasupujuju]] || [[word:zasupushushu|zasupushushu]] || [[word:zasupuku|zasupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zasuputhun|zasuputhun]] || [[word:zasupujun|zasupujun]] || [[word:zasupushun|zasupushun]] || [[word:zasupukun|zasupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zasuputhuoro|zasuputhuoro]] || [[word:zasupujuoro|zasupujuoro]] || [[word:zasupushuoro|zasupushuoro]] || [[word:zasupukuoro|zasupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
